zh.Hereford, Herefordshire, England: 英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德
zh.Croft Castle, Leominster, Herefordshire,: 英國英格蘭賀福爾萊奧明斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Verch Owain Glendower於1374年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，她的父親Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd15歲，母親Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer17歲。她於1392年與Sir John Croft在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1393年享年19歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Verch Owain Glendower于1374年出生在英国威尔斯丹比爾时，她的父亲Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd15岁，母亲Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer17岁。她于1392年与Sir John Croft在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1393年享年19岁。

variants.name: O'Callaghan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Liam, Dermot, Donal, Kiernan, Niall, Conor, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Siobhan, Tiernan.
Irish (Cork): from Gaelic Ó Ceallacháin, see Callahan .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Verch Owain Glendower was born in 1374, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, was 15 and her mother, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, was 17. She married Sir John Croft in 1392, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1393, at the age of 19.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Verch Owain Glendower est née en 1374, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Croft en 1392, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1393, à l’âge de 19 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Verch Owain Glendower 1374 in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd 15 und ihre Mutter Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer 17. Sie hat 1392 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Croft geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1393 im Alter von 19 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Verch Owain Glendower è nata il nel 1374 nel Denbighshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Croft nel 1392, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1393, all'età di 19 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Verch Owain Glendowerが1374年にイギリスウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffyddは15歳，母Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmerは17歳であった。1392年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでSir John Croftと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1393年に19歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Verch Owain Glendower(이)가 1374년 영국 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 1392년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Sir John Croft(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1393년 19세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Verch Owain Glendower nasceu em 1374, em Denbighshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Croft em 1392, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1393, com 19 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Verch Owain Glendower родилась в 1374 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Croft в 1392 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1393 г. в возрасте 19 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Verch Owain Glendower nació en 1374, en Denbighshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Owain Glyndŵr ap Gruffydd, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Marred Ferch Daffydd aka Margaret Hanmer, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Sir John Croft en 1392, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1393, a la edad de 19 años.
